title: dracocephalum virginianum var. granulosum
intro: Dracocephalum virginianum var. granulosum, also known as White Dragon's Head or Granular Dragonhead, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae, characterized by its white or pale purple flowers and hairy leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dracocephalum virginianum var. granulosum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can lead to improved overall well-being. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
